name: Sauda Golfklubb

course.signatureHole: Naturskjønne omgivelser i Saudasjøen med utsikt mot Saudafjorden
course.scenicHole: Naturskjønne omgivelser i Saudasjøen med utsikt mot Saudafjorden
course.viewDescription: Sauda Golfklubb er en 9-hulls skogsbane i naturskjønne omgivelser i Saudasjøen, 3 km fra Sauda sentrum, lengst inne i Ryfylkefjorden. Åpnet 2008. Par 30. Selvbetjent bane med klubbhus i hyttestil. Driving range, putting green, simulator. Fantastisk utsikt mot Saudafjorden. Sesong mars-oktober.
course.signatureHole_en: Scenic surroundings at Saudasjoeen with views towards the Saudafjord
course.scenicHole_en: Scenic surroundings at Saudasjoeen with views towards the Saudafjord
course.viewDescription_en: Sauda Golf Club is a 9-hole woodland course in scenic surroundings at Saudasjoeen, three kilometres from Sauda town centre, at the head of the Ryfylke fjord. Opened in 2008. Par 30. Self-service course with a cabin-style clubhouse. Stunning views towards the Saudafjord.

description: Sauda Golfklubb er en 9-hulls skogsbane i naturskjønne omgivelser i Saudasjøen, tre kilometer fra Sauda sentrum, lengst inne i Ryfylkefjorden. Åpnet i 2008. Par 30. Selvbetjent bane med klubbhus bygget i hyttestil. Fantastisk utsikt mot Saudafjorden.

2023.greenFeeDescription: Greenfee (2023-priser): 9 hull/dagspass 100 kr (hverdager), 150 kr (helger og høytidsdager). Selvbetjent bane.
2023.notes: Veien til Golf (VTG) kurs 990 kr. Deltakere får 50% rabatt på medlemskap og spiller gratis resten av sesongen (gjelder kun første medlemsår).
2023.greenFeeDescription_en: Green fee (2023 prices): 9 holes/day pass 100 kr (weekdays), 150 kr (weekends and public holidays). Self-service course.
2023.notes_en: Get Into Golf (VTG) course 990 kr. Participants get 50% discount on membership and play free for the rest of the season (first membership year only).

2025.greenFeeDescription: Dagskort mandag-søndag 300 kr. Junior (t.o.m. 19 år), student, vernepliktig 150 kr. Banen er selvbetjent - betaling via VIPPS #100434.
2025.greenFeeDescription_en: Day pass Monday-Sunday 300 kr. Junior (up to 19 years), student, military service 150 kr. Self-service course - payment via Vipps #100434.

2026.greenFeeDescription: Dagskort mandag-søndag 300 kr. Junior (t.o.m. 19 år), student, vernepliktig 150 kr. Banen er selvbetjent - betaling via VIPPS #100434.
2026.notes: Selvbetjent bane. Betaling via VIPPS #100434. Ingen utleie av utstyr tilgjengelig - spillere må ta med eget utstyr.
2026.greenFeeDescription_en: Day pass Monday-Sunday 300 kr. Junior (up to 19 years), student, military service 150 kr. Self-service course - payment via Vipps #100434.
2026.notes_en: Self-service course. Payment via Vipps #100434. No equipment hire available - players must bring their own equipment.

2025.description: Hovedmedlem MED medlemslån, med fritt spill: 4000 kr/år
2025.description_en: Full member WITH member loan, with free play: 4,000 kr/year

2025.description: Hovedmedlem UTEN medlemslån, med fritt spill: 4500 kr/år
2025.description_en: Full member WITHOUT member loan, with free play: 4,500 kr/year

2025.description: Hovedmedlem greenfee (fyller 20 år eller mer i inneværende år): 2400 kr/år
2025.description_en: Full member green fee (turning 20 years or older in the current year): 2,400 kr/year

2025.description: Eldre junior fritt spill (16-19 år) eller student/vernepliktig: 1200 kr/år
2025.description_en: Older junior free play (16-19 years) or student/military service: 1,200 kr/year

2025.description: Eldre junior greenfee (16-19 år) eller student/vernepliktig: 600 kr/år
2025.description_en: Older junior green fee (16-19 years) or student/military service: 600 kr/year

2025.description: Yngre junior (fyller 0-15 år i inneværende år): 205 kr/år
2025.description_en: Younger junior (turning 0-15 years in the current year): 205 kr/year

2025.description: Hyttepakke - Hovedmedlem i annen klubb, bostedsadresse utenfor Sauda: 2500 kr/år
2025.description_en: Holiday cottage package - Full member in another club, residential address outside Sauda: 2,500 kr/year
Distance member (residential address outside Sauda): 1,200 kr/year

description_en: Sauda Golf Club is a 9-hole woodland course in scenic surroundings at Saudasjoeen, three kilometres from Sauda town centre, at the head of the Ryfylke fjord. Opened in 2008. Par 30. Self-service course with a cabin-style clubhouse. Stunning views towards the Saudafjord.

images.alt_en: Aerial view of Sauda Golf Club with overview of the course in scenic Grønsdal by the Ryfylke Fjord

images.alt_en: Hole 9 at Sauda Golf Club with clubhouse and view over Saudasjøen

images.alt_en: Aerial view of holes 3, 4, 5 and 6 at Sauda Golf Club in hilly forest terrain
